caption:
Cheapest Michelin Lunch in Ginza, Tokyo 🇨🇳✨

📍 Location: Canton 8 (Ginza) / 喜粵8号 8F, 8-2-1 Ginza, Chuo City, Tokyo A short walk from Ginza Station / Shimbashi Station 

🕒 Hours: 11:30 AM – 3:00 PM, 5:30 PM – 10:00 PM 
💰 Price: Lunch Sets from ¥1,500–2,500 (Under $15)

Did you know the world's cheapest Michelin 2-star restaurant is right here in Ginza? 😳

This place brings the legendary flavors of the Shanghai 2-star restaurant to Tokyo. We ordered the Shrimp Chili Lunch Set for under $15! The shrimps are massive, bouncy, and the sauce is absolutely refined. It’s a hidden gem where you can enjoy luxury dining without breaking the bank!

Comment "Michelin" for more info 📩 

#tokyo #ginza #canton8 #michelinstar #japanesefood #tokyofood #japantrip #localgem #gappyjapan
transcript: What's the best restaurant in Turkey? Mmm... Canton 8 Why? You can eat Michelin food for less than $15 Alright, let's go!
